gcp.certificatemanager.projects.location.description: Creates a new CertificateMap in a given project and location.

required.description: Required. The parent resource of the certificate map. Must be in the format `projects/*/locations/*`.

gcp.certificatemanager.projects.location.description: Deletes a single CertificateMap. A Certificate Map can't be deleted if it contains Certificate Map Entries. Remove all the entries from the map before calling this method.

required.description: Required. A name of the certificate map to delete. Must be in the format `projects/*/locations/*/certificateMaps/*`.
